channel.title: Blog Customization on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blog Customization on yexca'Blog

item.title: Embedding External Video Links in Blogs
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview

This article was written by Hiyoung

Original article: https://blog.hiyoung.icu/2022/08/11/607cac6fe835/

Most mainstream streaming platforms support embedding code for external links. However, as of August 11, 2022, Bilibili’s (when is it shutting down?) default embed link defaults to 360P and doesn’t allow quality adjustments. It’s pretty frustrating compared to YouTube. Below are the parameters and methods for customizing Bilibili’s embed links.

Bilibili Embed Links

Original Embed Link:
